subcodes.first_line: O compassionate Lord! Illumine the hearts with the light of supreme guidance, and quicken the souls with the Most Great glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان قلوب را بنور هدایت کبری منور فرما جانها را ببشارت عظمی حیات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for service, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
